metadata.title: Gasparro Fotografia | Wedding Photography
metadata.description: Photography studio specializing in weddings, maternity and newborns in Puglia and Italy. Modern and sophisticated photography.

navigation.logoAlt: Gasparro Fotografie Logo - Photography studio specializing in weddings

intro.title: EVERY DETAIL SPEAKS OF YOU:
intro.description: Our studio is in constant pursuit of Beauty. As a Wedding Photographer in Puglia, our vision of photography and video is Modern & Sophisticated — capturing with spontaneity every detail and every person with poetic sensitivity and an editorial touch. It will be an immersive journey into the beauty of your event, because you deserve a unique memory that lives forever.
intro.descriptionMobile: Modern and sophisticated photography, with poetic sensitivity and an editorial touch. Every moment of your day, preserved forever.
intro.subtitle: That is why we preserve your most authentic moments, so you can relive love in every glance.
intro.subtitleMobile: To relive love in every glance

parallax.description: At Gasparro Fotografia, we are committed to telling your story and the story of your wedding day by naturally capturing the details, people and authentic interactions that make it unique.
parallax.descriptionMobile: We tell your story by capturing the authentic details, people and moments that make your wedding unique.

gallerySection.title: Our Shots
gallerySection.descriptionMobile: Emotions, details, unique moments. Your story, preserved forever.
gallerySection.description: We tell the magic of your most special day with shots that go beyond the image. We do not simply photograph — we capture emotions, details, unique moments that speak of you. A spontaneous smile, a gentle touch, a glance that says everything. Because your story deserves to be preserved forever.

weddings.title: Weddings
weddings.description: We capture every precious moment of your special day with artistic sensitivity and emotional depth.

maternity.title: Maternity
maternity.description: We celebrate the wonderful journey of motherhood with elegant and intimate portraits that tell the story of anticipation and joy in this unique moment.

newborn.title: Newborns
newborn.description: Delicate and safe sessions that immortalize the first moments of life. Artistic portraits that preserve the miracle of birth with tenderness and care.

finalSection.title: YOUR NEXT CHAPTER IS
finalSection.subtitle: Discover the opportunities created for you

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro1: Information on the processing of personal data (art. 13 of Law 196/03) for the website
privacyPolicy.intro2: by Donato Gasparro. The information on this page summarizes the privacy and personal data protection policies of Donato Gasparro, the company owning the website
privacyPolicy.intro3: . This notice is provided pursuant to art. 13 of Legislative Decree No. 196/2003 – Personal Data Protection Code – to those who interact with the web services of Donato Gasparro, accessible at the web address
privacyPolicy.intro4: . This policy does not apply to other websites accessible via our links, for which Donato Gasparro bears no responsibility.
privacyPolicy.section1Text: The data controller is Donato Gasparro, Photography Studio: Fotografia Gasparro, located at Piazza XX Settembre, 15, Martina Franca 74015, Puglia, Italy, reachable by email at: info@gasparrofotografia.it.
privacyPolicy.section2Text: This notice applies to the website www.gasparrofotografia.it and describes how personal data provided by users through the contact form is processed. The policy does not apply to other linked websites, for which the studio bears no responsibility.
privacyPolicy.section3Text: Through the contact form, the following data may be collected: first and last name, email address, mobile number and any other data voluntarily provided by the user in their message.
privacyPolicy.section4Text: Data collected through the contact form will be used solely to respond to client enquiries (e.g. brides or clients interested in photography services) and to maintain email correspondence until the matter is resolved. Data will not be used for marketing purposes or shared with third parties, except as required by law.
privacyPolicy.section5Text: Processing is based on the execution of pre-contractual measures at the request of the data subject (art. 6, para. 1, letter b of the GDPR). No consent checkbox is required to submit the form.
privacyPolicy.section6Text: Data will be retained only for as long as necessary to respond to enquiries and maintain email correspondence. Beyond this period, data will not be stored.
privacyPolicy.section7Text: Data is processed using electronic tools and appropriate security measures to prevent loss, unauthorized access or unlawful use.
privacyPolicy.section8Text: The website does not use profiling cookies or external tracking systems.
privacyPolicy.section9Text: Photos taken by the studio may be used for promotional purposes on the website, social media and marketing materials. Copyright of all photos belongs to Donato Gasparro / Photography Studio Fotografia Gasparro. Images of clients will only be published with their explicit consent.
privacyPolicy.section10Text: Users of the website www.gasparrofotografia.it have the right, at any time, to obtain confirmation of whether or not personal data concerning them exists, to know its content and origin, to verify its accuracy or request its integration, update or correction. They also have the right to request erasure, restriction of processing or to object, on legitimate grounds, to its processing, as well as to exercise — where applicable — the right to data portability. To exercise these rights, please contact the Data Controller by sending a message to info@gasparrofotografia.it.

booking.question: How far in advance should we book the wedding photography service?
booking.answer: We recommend booking as early as possible, ideally at least 12 months before your wedding date. Spring and summer weekends fill up very quickly, so the sooner you contact us, the more likely you are to secure your date. That said, do not hesitate to reach out even with shorter notice — we will do our best to find a solution.

engagement.question: Is it possible to do an engagement or pre-wedding shoot?
engagement.answer: Absolutely! An engagement session is a wonderful opportunity to get to know each other before the big day and to feel comfortable in front of the camera in a natural and relaxed way. It is also a great chance to have beautiful photos to use for your invitations or simply to keep as a special memory of your journey together.

locations.question: Do you work only in Italy or do you also travel abroad?
locations.answer: We work throughout Italy and are available to travel abroad for special destinations. Whether it is an exclusive venue in Tuscany, a ceremony on the Amalfi Coast or a wedding in Europe, we are ready to follow you wherever your love takes you. For destinations outside Italy, travel expenses simply need to be agreed upon in advance.

photogenic.question: I am not photogenic — how will I look good in photos?
photogenic.answer: This is by far the question we hear most from brides, and yet when they receive their photos they are always amazed by how beautiful they look. We are professionals who know how to photograph our couples by highlighting their best features and minimizing imperfections. During the editing process we use our tools to gently refine the images, giving you the polished, magazine-worthy look you have always admired.

pricing.question: What is the cost of the photography service?
pricing.answer: Our packages are designed to suit different needs and budgets. The price varies depending on the length of coverage, the number of photographers and the products included (albums, prints, digital files). We invite you to contact us for a personalized, no-obligation quote — we will be happy to find the solution that best fits your wedding.

video.question: Do you also offer video services in addition to photography?
video.answer: Yes, we collaborate with professional videographers to create trailers, full-length films or short highlight reels of your day.
